name: Italian Envelopes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (2 oz.) finely chopped mozzarella cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the beaten egg, ricotta cheese, chopped salami, mozzarella cheese, crushed oregano, salt, and pepper.
2. Place a won-ton wrapper at an angle with one corner facing you.
3. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the cheese mixture into the center of the wrapper.
4. Lightly brush the edges of the wrapper with water.
5. Fold the right and left corners inward, overlapping slightly.
6. Bring the bottom and top corners together, overlapping slightly in the middle.
7. Repeat steps 3-6 until all ingredients are used.
8. Heat oil in a large skillet.
9. Fry the envelopes in batches, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan, until golden on both sides.
10. Remove from the skillet; immediately sprinkle the tops with Parmesan cheese.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Repeat steps 8-11 until all are cooked.
13. Serve warm. Makes 18 to 20 servings.
